case_title: GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION VS. CARLOS A. TEJADA, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA TAMALPAIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARLOS A. TEJADA, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA TAMALPAIS VENDING CO. $10,741.43 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,472.54 INTEREST, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,638.97, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION SERVED DEC-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARLOS A. TEJADA, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA TAMALPAIS VENDING CO.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 50, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $14,361.81 AS TO DEFENDANT CARLOS A. TEJADA, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA TAMALPAIS VENDING CO.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CARLOS A. TEJADA, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA TAMALPAIS VENDING CO. DOES 1 THROUGH 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-18-2011
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,000.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $600.84 INTEREST, $62.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CARLOS A. TEJADA, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA TAMALPAIS VENDING CO.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CARLOS A. TEJADA, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA TAMALPAIS VENDING CO.
